      ↑((↑(@Aux.c_v_alg V inst✝² inst✝¹ v)).toAddMonoidHom.comp
            (LinearMap.lTensor (IntegralLattice ℤ ℚ V)
                (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletionIntegers ℚ

      filter_upwards [this.compl_mem_cofinite]
      intro v hv
      have : v.valuation ℚ φ.det = 1 := hv
      simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.Bijective, ContinuousLinearEquiv.toContinuousAddEquiv,
        ContinuousAddEquiv.toAddEquiv, AddEquiv.toEquiv]

by
      apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
      intro v
      have h₁ : IsUnit (φ.det) := LinearEquiv.isUnit_det φ
      have h₂ : (φ.det : ℚ) ≠ 0 := Units.ne_zero h₁
      have h₃ : ∀ᶠ p in Filter.cofinite, padicNorm p (φ.det) = 1 := by
        apply norm_eventually_one h₂
      have h₄ : ∀ᶠ p in Filter.cofinite, padicNorm p (φ.det⁻¹) = 1 := by
        apply norm_eventually_one (Units.ne_zero h₁.symm)
      filter_upwards [h₃, h₄] with p hp
      have h₅ : (φ : V →ₗ[ℚ] V).det = φ.det := rfl
      have h₆ : (φ.symm : V →ₗ[ℚ] V).det = φ.det⁻¹ := by
        rw [LinearEquiv.det_symm]
      simp_all [Set.BijOn, Function.Bijective, LinearEquiv.apply_symm_apply,
        LinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]

by
      apply Filter.eventually_cofinite.mpr
      use {v | v.valuation ℚ (φ.det) = 1}
      constructor
      · exact Set.finite_of_finite_valuation_ne_one _ (Units.ne_zero φ.det)
      · intro v hv
        simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hv
        have : (Aux.continuousBaseChange (IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.adicCompletion ℚ v) φ).det = φ.det := by
          simp [Aux.continuousBaseChange, LinearEquiv.det_baseChange]
        rw [← this]
        refine' LinearEquiv.bijOn_range_of_det_mem_units _
        exact hv

by
      apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
      intro v
      have : IsUnit (φ.det : ℚˣ) := LinearEquiv.isUnit_det φ
      have hv : v.valuation ℚ (φ.det) = 1 := by
        apply IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation_eq_one_of_isUnit
        exact_mod_cast this
      simp_all [hv]

by
      have h_det : φ.det ≠ 0 := LinearEquiv.det_ne_zero φ
      have h_val : ∀ᶠ v in Filter.cofinite, IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v (φ.det) = 1 := by
        apply IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.eventually_one_of_nonzero
        exact h_det
      filter_upwards [h_val] with v hv
      simp only [Set.BijOn, Set.mem_range, Function.Injective, Function.Surjective]
      intro x hx
      obtain ⟨y, rfl⟩ := hx
      use φ.symm y
      simp [hv, LinearEquiv.map_det, LinearEquiv.symm_apply_apply]

by
      have : φ.det ≠ 0 := LinearEquiv.det_ne_zero φ
      have : ∀ᶠ v in Filter.cofinite, IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.valuation ℚ v φ.det = 1 := by
        apply IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.eventually_eq_one_of_ne_zero
        exact this
      filter_upwards [this] with v hv
      simp only [Set.BijOn, Set.mem_range, Function.Injective, Function.Surjective]
      intro x hx
      use (φ.symm ⊗ₗ LinearMap.id) x
      constructor
      · simp [TensorProduct.RightActions.LinearEquiv.baseChange_apply, hv]
      · simp [TensorProduct.RightActions.LinearEquiv.baseChange_apply, hv]
